title: erysimum smyrnaeum
intro: Erysimum smyrnaeum, also known as Wormwood or Syrian Wormwood, is a perennial herb belonging to the Brassicaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, antispasmodic, and expectorant qualities. The health benefits of Erysimum smyrnaeum include its potential to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to aid in digestion and reduce inflammation. Erysimum smyrnaeum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
